description: Canonical Mission Control agent registry. Single source of truth for all agent identity, coordination metadata, and runtime eligibility. src/lib/agent-coordination.ts derives its registry from this file. ACTIVE agents with enabled:true are coordinator-orchestrated. ACTIVE agents with enabled:false are gate-enforced via API. PLANNED agents are not executable.

agents.name: Repo Steward
agents.description: Observe-only repository health and cleanliness check

agents.name: Skill Intake
agents.description: Observe-only external skill/repo candidate registry reader

agents.name: Systems Curator
agents.description: Observe-only implementation-gap auditor for Mission Control runtime wiring

agents.name: MC Coordinator
agents.description: Observe-only orchestration spine that runs all enabled observe_only agents

agents.name: Passive Income Bot
agents.description: Heuristic product opportunity scorer. Invoked via POST /api/bots/passive-income with execution gate enforcement. Not coordinator-orchestrated.

agents.name: Stocks Research Bot
agents.description: Equity and ETF research, paper trading simulation. Not yet wired.

agents.name: Sports Betting Bot
agents.description: Sports odds research, edge detection, paper betting simulation. Not yet wired.

agents.name: Appliance Intelligence Bot
agents.description: Appliance fault diagnosis, repair guidance, parts research. Not yet wired.

agents.name: Builder Bot
agents.description: Code generation, CI/CD, dependency management. Not yet wired.

agents.name: Research Scout
agents.description: Literature review, competitive analysis, web intelligence. Not yet wired.

agents.name: Content Bot
agents.description: Copywriting, image prompts, social media drafts. Not yet wired.
